name: Commit Streak
description: Shows your current commit streak in the status bar (Tier 1) and a GitHub-style 52-week contribution heatmap in a webview panel (Tier 2). ADR-0026 dogfood.

webviewPanels.title: Commit Streak
webviewPanels.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="22 12 18 12 15 21 9 3 6 12 2 12"/></svg>
